violations.text: The floor to the outside, located in the production room, is in poor repair. Hole observed. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
The condensers in the walk-in cooler, located in the basement, are in poor repair. Leak observed. Condensers must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The prep tables located in the bottling prep area are not designed and constructed for easy cleanability. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The three bay sink, is not plumbed to drain. Corrective action - three bay sink must be plumbed to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2025
The bathroom was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
